title: Shipping / Store Assistant (Shipment / Production Supply Chain / East)
description:
• Working hours: Mon - Fri, 8am - 5pm
  • Salary: Up to $2.5k + AWS + VB
  • Location: Ubi (Near Macpherson MRT)


Position: Shipping/Store Assistant

  1. Able handle company’s daily shipment activities & fulfil various customer shipment expectations.
  2. Able handle company’s incoming and outgoing goods and manage company’s stock. Support daily supply chain operations and job order fulfilment.

Job Responsibilities

Shipping:

  • Pick the good at designated staging rack.
  • Input & update the good receive information to system for shipment.
  • Pack and label the good on the tray & shipping box.
  • Update system of shipment info and verify the special requirement and act accordingly from customer if any.
  • Generate the Packing Slip and Commercial invoice from system.
  • Prepare, communicate and co-ordinate with forwarder of the shipment collection.
  • Cross support to other areas and sections if necessary.

Store:

  • Perform the job issuing according to job order from internal customer.
  • Perform the customer order goods picking and fulfillment.
  • Good practices on FIFO (First In First Out) manner.
  • Weight/count, pack & label of components based on job requirements.
  • Dispatch the job order, materials & components to designated department.
  • Perform the physical stock take.
  • Prepare & delivery shipment goods to Shipping Department.
  • Update system of the goods movement.
  • Cross support to other areas and sections if necessary.
  • Handle ad hoc & other tasks assigned by supervisor/manager.

Requirements:

  • Working experience in shipping & store roles
  • Some PC knowledge.

HOW TO APPLY

Interested applicants, kindly click on “APPLY NOW” or send your resume in MS WORD format to hestia.wong(at)trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd
